str:translations.str:about_feeds: This is a web feed, also known as an Atom feed. Subscribe by copying the URL from the address bar into your newsreader. Visit About Feeds to learn more and get started. It's free.

feed.title: ~/nbaig-dev - google
feed.subtitle: I am a backend web developer with 14+ years of experience. In this blog I will be posting my journey with the Rust Programming Language.

entry.title: Tech Industry Diversity and Inclusion Initiatives
entry.summary: The tech industry has come under scrutiny in recent years for its lack of representation and inclusion of underrepresented groups. As the demand for talent in the sector continues to grow, it's crucial that companies prioritize diversity initiatives to promote a more inclusive and equitable workforce. In this blog post, we'll explore ten tech industry diversity and inclusion initiatives that are making a real difference.
